data.formula: {"total_price": ( resolution = "720p" ? ( audio and audio != "" ? ( $number(get_duration_v2(audio)) <= 5 ? $number(base_price) * 2 : ( $min([ $number(get_duration_v2(audio)), 20 ]) / 5 * $number(base_price) * 2 ) ) : $number(base_price) * 2 ) : ( audio and audio != "" ? ( $number(get_duration_v2(audio)) <= 5 ? $number(base_price) : ( $min([ $number(get_duration_v2(audio)), 15 ]) / 5 * $number(base_price) ) ) : $number(base_price) ) )}

steps.description: Number of steps to train the LoRA on.

trigger_word.description:
Trigger word to be used in the captions. If None, a trigger word will not be used.

movement_amplitude.description: The movement amplitude of objects in the frame. Defaults to auto, accepted value: auto small medium large.

prompt.description: The positive prompt for the generation.

seed.description: The random seed to use for the generation. -1 means a random seed will be used.

data.name: wavespeed-ai/flux-1-srpo
data.description: FLUX.1 SRPO is a 12B-parameter flow transformer that generates high-quality images from text prompts for personal and commercial use. Ready-to-use REST inference API, best performance, no coldstarts, affordable pricing.

enable_base64_output.description: If enabled, the output will be encoded into a BASE64 string instead of a URL. This property is only available through the API.

enable_sync_mode.description: If set to true, the function will wait for the result to be generated and uploaded before returning the response. It allows you to get the result directly in the response. This property is only available through the API.

guidance_scale.description: The guidance scale to use for the generation.

num_inference_steps.description: The number of inference steps to perform.

output_format.description: The format of the output image.

prompt.description: The positive prompt for the generation.

seed.description: The random seed to use for the generation. -1 means a random seed will be used.

size.description: The size of the generated media in pixels (width*height).

strength.description: Strength indicates extent to transform the reference image.

data.name: pixverse/swap
data.description: PixVerse Swap replaces backgrounds, people, and objects directly inside existing videos for quick scene changes and creative edits with natural-looking results. Ready-to-use REST inference API, best performance, no cold starts, affordable pricing.

image.description: The model generates video with the picture passed in as the first frame.Base64 encoded strings in data:image/jpeg; base64,{data} format for incoming images, or URLs accessible via the public network. The uploaded image needs to meet the following conditions: Format is JPG/JPEG/PNG; The aspect ratio is greater than 2:5 and less than 5:2; Short side pixels greater than 300px; The image file size cannot exceed 20MB.

mode.description: The swap mode to use Default value: person

video.description: The video to be swapped.

data.name: wavespeed-ai/openai-whisper-with-video
data.description: Whisper Large v3 speech-to-text with video support: instant, accurate multilingual transcripts from video files. Upload videos to extract audio and get transcripts. Ready-to-use REST API, no coldstarts, affordable pricing.

enable_sync_mode.description: If set to true, the function will wait for the result to be generated and uploaded before returning the response. It allows you to get the result directly in the response. This property is only available through the API.

enable_timestamps.description: Enable to generate word-level timestamps for the transcription. Note: This may increase processing time.

language.description: Language spoken in the audio. Set to 'auto' for automatic language detection (default).

prompt.description: An optional text to provide as a prompt to guide the model's style or continue a previous audio segment. The prompt should be in the same language as the audio.
prompt.x-placeholder: Enter a prompt to guide transcription

task.description: The task to perform. 'transcribe' to the source language or 'translate' to English.

video.description: Video file or URL to transcribe. Provide an HTTPS URL or upload a video file. Audio will be extracted for transcription.

data.name: wavespeed-ai/paddle-ocr
data.description: PaddleOCR-VL: Ultra-compact 0.9B parameter vision-language model for document parsing. Supports 109 languages with text, table, formula, and chart recognition. Output in JSON or Markdown format.

enable_sync_mode.description: If set to true, the function will wait for the result to be generated and uploaded before returning the response. It allows you to get the result directly in the response. This property is only available through the API.

image.description: Document image to parse. Supports text, tables, formulas, and charts recognition in 109 languages.
image.x-placeholder: Upload document image or provide URL

output_format.description: Output format: 'json' for structured data or 'markdown' for human-readable text.

data.name: wavespeed-ai/qwen-image-2512-lora-trainer
data.description: Train custom Qwen-Image-2512 LoRA models 10x faster. Style training, character training, object training. From concept to model in minutes, not hours. Upload a ZIP file containing images to start!

URL to zip archive with images. Try to use at least 4 images in general the more the better.

        In addition to images the archive can contain text files with captions. Each text file should have the same name as the image file it corresponds to.
data.x-placeholder: Please upload a zip file containing images.

steps.description: Number of steps to train the LoRA on.

trigger_word.description:
Trigger word to be used in the captions. If None, a trigger word will not be used.
        If no captions are provide the trigger_word will be used instead of captions. If captions are the trigger word will not be used.

images.description: URL(s) of condition image(s) for image-to-image generation. Supports up to 4 URLs.

output_format.description: The format of the output image.

prompt.description: The positive prompt for the generation.

seed.description: The random seed to use for the generation. -1 means a random seed will be used.

size.description: The size of the generated media in pixels (width*height).
